australian_relation: National Trust NSW public institutional article with distinct source-stated ghost-tour accounts at Old Government House.
coordinate_evidence_note: National Trust NSW page names Old Government House and Parramatta Park and describes tour visitors seeing a little girl by the tree; coordinates use the state-checked OSM/Nominatim Old Government House point.
evidence_summary: National Trust NSW says Rodney Holman has led ghost tours at Old Government House for 12 years. He describes a tree in Parramatta Park near Old Government House that consistently lights up a Ghost Meter, and says a few tour visitors reported seeing a little girl by the tree near the obelisk marking where Lady Mary Fitzroy received fatal injuries.
publication_or_organisation: Spooky stories at the National Trust; National Trust NSW Editor

australian_relation: National Trust NSW public institutional article with distinct source-stated ghost-tour accounts at Old Government House.
coordinate_evidence_note: National Trust NSW page names Old Government House and describes two children hearing a cranky woman whisper on the stairs during a ghost tour; coordinates use the state-checked OSM/Nominatim Old Government House point.
evidence_summary: National Trust NSW says Old Government House runs kid-friendly ghost tours and that on one tour two twelve-year-old boys had their photo taken on the stairs and heard a cranky woman whispering in their ears, "get off the stairs." The page frames this as one of the house's cranky ghost accounts.
publication_or_organisation: Spooky stories at the National Trust; National Trust NSW Editor
title: cranky woman in Old Government House staircase whisper
